# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that builds Docker images with user-provided image tags and registry URLs. Accept these as build parameters and use them directly in docker build and push commands. This allows teams to deploy to different registries without modifying the pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'REGISTRY_URL', defaultValue: 'docker.io/your_dockerhub_username', description: 'The URL of the Docker registry (e.g., myregistry.com/myorg or docker.io/your_username)')
        string(name: 'IMAGE_TAG', defaultValue: 'my-app:latest', description: 'The tag for the Docker image (e.g., my-app:1.0.0 or my-app:latest)')
        string(name: 'DOCKER_CREDENTIAL_ID', defaultValue: 'docker-registry-credentials', description: 'Jenkins credential ID for Docker registry login (Username with password type)')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Login to Docker Registry') {
            steps {
                script {
                    // Extract the registry host from the full REGISTRY_URL
                    def registryHost = REGISTRY_URL.split('/')[0]
                    withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId: DOCKER_CREDENTIAL_ID, usernameVariable: 'DOCKER_USER', passwordVariable: 'DOCKER_PASS')]) {
                        sh "echo \"$DOCKER_PASS\" | docker login -u \"$DOCKER_USER\" --password-stdin ${registryHost}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def fullImageName = "${REGISTRY_URL}/${IMAGE_TAG}"
                    echo "Building Docker image: ${fullImageName}"
                    // Assuming Dockerfile is in the root of the workspace
                    sh "docker build -t ${fullImageName} ."
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Push Docker Image') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def fullImageName = "${REGISTRY_URL}/${IMAGE_TAG}"
                    echo "Pushing Docker image: ${fullImageName}"
                    sh "docker push ${fullImageName}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Logout from Docker Registry') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def registryHost = REGISTRY_URL.split('/')[0]
                    sh "docker logout ${registryHost}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
